title: Xberg structured-extraction preset
description: Meta-schema every preset file under crates/presets/library/ must satisfy. Defines the canonical preset format consumed by structured-extraction catalogs.

id.description: Stable, URL-safe preset identifier. Lowercase snake_case.

version.description: Preset version, monotonically increased on breaking changes.

schema_name.description: Human-readable schema name (used as the LLM tool/response name).

schema.description: JSON Schema (draft 2020-12) describing the structured output shape.

system_prompt.description: Instruction primer sent to the vision/text model.

context_template.description: Mustache-style template merged with caller-supplied context map.

merge_mode.description: Strategy for merging per-batch model outputs across paginated calls.

preferred_call_mode.description: Default call mode suggested for this preset; heuristics may override.

emit_citations.description: When true, prompt asks the model to wrap each field as {value, page, bbox, confidence}.
